name: EVI INDUSTRIES, INC.
business: The Company is a value-added distributor of commercial laundry equipment, parts, and services. It sells and leases equipment specializing in washing, drying, finishing, material handling, water heating, power generation, and water reuse applications. Its customers include government, institutional, industrial, commercial, and retail customers.

exposures.sentence: The Company sells and/or leases its customers commercial laundry equipment, specializing in washing, drying, finishing, material handling, water heating, power generation, and water reuse applications.

catalysts.sentence: on August 1, 2025, the Company acquired New York-based ASN Laundry Group for total consideration of $0.6 million in cash.

catalysts.event: Amendment of Credit Agreement to increase borrowing capacity
catalysts.sentence: On March 26, 2025, the Company amended the Credit Agreement to increase the maximum aggregate principal amount from $100 million to $150 million and increase the accordion feature from $40 million to $50 million, for a total of $200 million.
